new_cases.governing_requirement: Full DescriptorSetInput passes UnitContext, canonical JSON, schema, predecessor, and coverage stages; the recomputed partition-entry semantic digest is the sole first failure.
new_cases.prohibited_fallback_or_stronger_claim: No earlier result, false success, translation, or partial assurance is permitted.

new_cases.governing_requirement: Direct complete PreparedUnitStructureInput reaches ERR_LOGICAL_SHA256_MISMATCH at the earlier CLAIM_SEMANTIC.json structural-member partition-entry semantic-digest comparison after every preceding unit-level predicate passes.
new_cases.prohibited_fallback_or_stronger_claim: T230 MUST NOT be cited as descriptor-set-origin evidence, MUST NOT alter production stage order, MUST NOT introduce a second claim-semantic byte source, and MUST NOT return success, translation, or partial assurance.
